task_completion.description: Navigate to the official manufacturer websites for the three microphones.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox browser tabs, address bar, or history showing visits to shure.com, neumann.com, and audio-technica.com.

task_completion.description: Download the official Data Sheet or User Guide (PDF) for each microphone to the Downloads folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal listing showing at least three PDF files corresponding to the SM7B, U 87 Ai, and AT2020 in the '~/Downloads/' directory.

task_completion.description: Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Studio Tech Specs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmarks menu, toolbar, or sidebar showing a folder explicitly named 'Studio Tech Specs'.

task_completion.description: Bookmark the three microphone product pages in the 'Studio Tech Specs' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the 'Studio Tech Specs' bookmark folder showing saved links to the Shure SM7B, Neumann U 87 Ai, and Audio-Technica AT2020 product pages.
File manager, text editor, or terminal showing a file named 'mic_specs.json' located in the '~/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Extract and save the correct Output Impedance and Sensitivity values for all three microphones into the JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'mic_specs.json' showing the correct impedance and sensitivity values for each microphone matching the privileged information.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser to navigate to the official sites and find the information.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Firefox browser open with active navigation to the required domains, rather than just terminal commands or hallucinated data.

integrity.description: The agent actually downloaded the PDFs from the websites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Firefox download manager shows the completed downloads, or the PDF files in the file manager have realistic file sizes (not 0 bytes).

integrity.description: The agent used the Firefox GUI to create the bookmarks and folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Firefox bookmark manager or bookmark star icon, rather than modifying browser profile databases directly via terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Shure SM7B: 150 Ohms, -59.0 dBV (1.12 mV/Pa). Neumann U87 Ai: 200 Ohms, 28.0 mV/Pa (-31.0 dBV). Audio-Technica AT2020: 100 Ohms, -37.0 dBV (14.1 mV/Pa). Official domains: shure.com, neumann.com, audio-technica.com.
